name: Smoke X
official_rules_text: A unit that has the Smoke X keyword can make the Smoke X action to place X Smoke tokens comepletely within 1 and in LOS of its unit leader. Smoke tokens cannot overlap any Objective, Advantage, Charge, or other Smoke tokens and must be placed on a flat surface.
description: A unit that has the Smoke X keyword can make the Smoke X action to place X Smoke tokens comepletely within 1 and in LOS of its unit leader. Smoke tokens cannot overlap any Objective, Advantage, Charge, or other Smoke tokens and must be placed on a flat surface.
